title: poa × complanata
intro: Poa × complanata, also known as Meadow Brome Grass or Common Brome Grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poa × complanata include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Poa × complanata often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and salves.
